question_en: Can you describe the child's family structure?
question_fr: Pouvez-vous décrire la composition de la famille de l’enfant ?
question_ar: هل يمكنك وصف تركيبة عائلة الطفل؟
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Does the child have brothers or sisters?
question_fr: هل لدى الطفل إخوة أو أخوات؟
question_ar: A-t-il des frères et sœurs ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Can you provide the names and ages of the siblings?
question_fr: هل يمكنك ذكر أسماء وأعمار الإخوة والأخوات؟
question_ar: Pouvez-vous donner les noms et âges de ses frères et sœurs ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Do they all have the same biological parents?
question_fr: هل جميع الإخوة لديهم نفس الوالدين البيولوجيين؟
question_ar: Ont-ils les mêmes parents biologiques ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Are any of the children adopted or fostered?
question_fr: هل هناك أطفال تم تبنيهم أو احتضانهم في العائلة؟
question_ar: Certains enfants ont-ils été adoptés ou accueillis dans la famille ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Are any of the children from a previous marriage?
question_fr: هل هناك أطفال من زواج سابق؟
question_ar: Certains enfants sont-ils issus d’un mariage précédent ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Are there other people living with the child at home?
question_fr: هل هناك أشخاص آخرون يعيشون مع الطفل في المنزل؟
question_ar: Y a-t-il d'autres personnes qui vivent avec l’enfant à la maison ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Have any siblings experienced developmental delays?
question_fr: هل عانى أحد الإخوة أو الأخوات من تأخر في النمو؟
question_ar: Certains frères et sœurs ont-ils eu un retard de développement ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Have any siblings had developmental problems requiring treatment?
question_fr: هل عانى أحد الإخوة أو الأخوات من مشاكل في النمو استدعت علاجًا؟
question_ar: Certains frères et sœurs ont-ils eu des problèmes de développement nécessitant un traitement ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Has either parent had developmental difficulties (such as delayed walking or speaking)?
question_fr: هل عانى أحد الوالدين من صعوبات في النمو (مثل تأخر المشي أو الكلام)؟
question_ar: L’un des parents a-t-il eu des difficultés de développement (comme retard de marche ou de parole) ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Has either parent had developmental problems requiring treatment?
question_fr: هل عانى أحد الوالدين من مشاكل في النمو استدعت علاجًا؟
question_ar: L’un des parents a-t-il eu des problèmes de développement nécessitant un traitement ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Is there anyone in the family with difficulties similar to the child's?
question_fr: هل يوجد شخص في العائلة يعاني من صعوبات مشابهة لصعوبات الطفل؟
question_ar: Y a-t-il quelqu’un dans la famille ayant des difficultés similaires à celles de l’enfant ?
section: Family History
description: Questionnaire for developmental screening (not a diagnostic tool)

question_en: Can the child organize his/her own play or activities without help?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant est capable d’organiser ses propres jeux ou activités sans aide ?
question_ar: هل يستطيع الطفل تنظيم لعبه أو أنشطته بدون مساعدة؟
possible_answers: Spontaneously engages in varied appropriate activities
No active or only repetitive/stereotyped activities
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: What does the child do when left alone?
question_fr: Que fait l’enfant lorsqu’il est laissé seul ?
question_ar: ماذا يفعل الطفل عندما يُترك وحده؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: What was the behavior at 4–5 years old?
question_fr: Quel était le comportement à l’âge de 4 à 5 ans ?
question_ar: كيف كان السلوك بين عمر 4 إلى 5 سنوات؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Did the child understand simple social games such as 'Farmer in the Dell' or nursery rhymes games?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant comprenait des jeux sociaux simples comme « le fermier est dans son pré » ou les rondes enfantines ?
question_ar: هل كان الطفل يفهم الألعاب الاجتماعية البسيطة مثل الأناشيد أو الدوائر الغنائية؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Did the child participate spontaneously and initiate actions in these games?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant participait spontanément et initiait les actions dans ces jeux ?
question_ar: هل كان الطفل يشارك تلقائيًا ويبدأ الأفعال في هذه الألعاب؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Did the child participate in teasing games or interactive play such as 'I’m going to catch you!' or tickling games?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant participait à des jeux taquins comme « Je vais t’attraper ! » ou « la bébête qui monte » ?
question_ar: هل شارك الطفل في ألعاب المزاح مثل المطاردة أو الدغدغة؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Does the child play games like peek-a-boo, clapping games, or 'Simon Says'?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant joue à « coucou-caché », aux jeux de tape-mains ou à « Jacques a dit » ?
question_ar: هل يلعب الطفل ألعاب مثل الغميضة أو التصفيق أو لعبة 'سايمون يقول'؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: What does the child think about other same-age children he does not know?
question_fr: Que pense l’enfant des autres enfants du même âge qu’il ne connaît pas ?
question_ar: ماذا يفكر الطفل في الأطفال الآخرين من نفس العمر الذين لا يعرفهم؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Is the child interested in other children?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant est intéressé par les autres enfants ?
question_ar: هل يهتم الطفل بالأطفال الآخرين؟
possible_answers: Clearly interested and tries to approach
Interested but no attempts to engage
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: What does the child do when he sees another child in familiar situations?
question_fr: Que fait l’enfant lorsqu’il voit un autre enfant dans une situation familière (bus, centre de loisirs, etc.) ?
question_ar: ماذا يفعل الطفل عندما يرى طفلاً آخر في أماكن مألوفة؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: What happens when another child approaches the child?
question_fr: Que se passe-t-il lorsqu’un autre enfant s’approche de lui ?
question_ar: ماذا يحدث عندما يقترب طفل آخر منه؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Does the child respond differently to siblings or familiar children?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant se comporte différemment avec un frère/sœur ou un enfant familier ?
question_ar: هل يتصرف الطفل بشكل مختلف مع الإخوة أو الأطفال الذين يعرفهم؟
possible_answers: Responds normally to peers and tries to interact
Responds sometimes, mainly with familiar children
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Does the child actively avoid other children?
question_fr: Est-ce que l’enfant évite activement les autres enfants ?
question_ar: هل يتجنب الطفل الأطفال الآخرين بشكل نشط؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired

question_en: Does the child show any special hand movements in front of the body, such as twisting the hands or rubbing them together as if washing them?
question_fr: Est-ce qu’il a une manière particulière de bouger ses mains devant son corps, par exemple se tordre les mains ou les frotter comme s’il les lavait ?
question_ar: هل يقوم بحركات خاصة بيديه أمام جسمه مثل لف اليدين أو فركهما كأنه يغسلهما؟
section: Language Regression - Types of Skills Lost
description: Assessment of specific language abilities lost for at least 3 months after being previously acquired
